deployedGeneratedSources.name: #utility.yul

documentation.text:
@dev Sets or updates a health record hash for the message sender.
 @param _recordHash The SHA-256 hash of the health record.

getRecordOwner(string).details: Retrieves the owner of a given health record hash.

params._recordHash: The SHA-256 hash of the health record.

returns._0: The address of the owner, or the zero address if not found.

setRecord(string).details: Sets or updates a health record hash for the message sender.

params._recordHash: The SHA-256 hash of the health record.

verifyRecord(string,address).details: Verifies if a record hash belongs to a specific owner.

params._recordHash: The SHA-256 hash of the health record.

returns._0: True if the hash belongs to the owner, false otherwise.
